# Weekly Operating Loop

## Monday — Decide batch

```text
Select one signal family: first frame, hook, text, proof, CTA, search, series.
Choose 5–10 hypotheses.
Assign platform/surface.
Preregister expected metric movement.
```

## Tuesday — Produce assets

```text
Write variants.
Build first frames.
Record/edit.
Run preflight acceptance tests.
Assign codes.
```

## Wednesday — Publish first wave

```text
Post 2–4 assets.
Use platform-native packaging.
Log initial metadata.
```

## Thursday — Publish second wave / controlled exposure

```text
Post 2–4 assets.
Use Trial Reel, community post, partner share, or paid micro-seeding where needed.
```

## Friday — 24h / 72h readout

```text
Classify failure gates.
Compare to rolling medians.
Select replicate/rewrite/kill candidates.
```

## Weekend — Build next variants

```text
Turn winners into replication trio.
Turn failures into corrected variants.
Create one search-native asset from strongest concept.
```

## Non-negotiable rule

No week is complete without:

```text
published tests
logged metrics
gate diagnosis
one decision per mechanism
```
